title: Sicilian Song.
content:
Ye black and roguish eyes,

    If ye command.
    Each house in ruins lies,

    No town can stand.
    And shall my bosom's chain, 

    This plaster wall,�
    To think one moment, deign, 

    Shall ii not fall?
meaning:
"Sicilian Song." is a quintessential example of Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
